q: Which of the following environmental factors can most affect the rate of transpiration?
In which of the following connective tissues are cells arranged loosely and embedded in a gel-like matrix?
If any liquid is heated along with a few impurities, then its boiling point will _____.
Up to which of the following is the reflection of a sound wave used to determine ocean depth?
o: Echo, which is produced when sound waves reflect off objects
Reflection of sound, where straight sound waves return
Reflection of sound, where sound waves are absorbed

q: Earth behaves like a giant magnet. What kind of force is this?
Impurities are converted to compounds by adding refining agents in which type of refining method?
Phosphoric acid (H3PO4) is formed from which of the following ions?
Balance the following reaction: 3MnO2 (s) + xAl (s) -> 3Mn (l) + yAl2O3 (s) + heat
It is the cellular powerhouse and produces ATP through aerobic respiration. Which of the following statements is correct?
o: Inner membrane of mitochondria has many folds and forms cristae
It carries genetic information and the nucleus controls cell activities
Number of mitochondria is fixed between cells
Cell's nuclear DNA is contained in mitochondria

q: Smooth endoplasmic reticulum (SER) is helpful in the formation of _____.
Mendel used how many contrasting traits to demonstrate his laws of inheritance?
Which of the following sounds has the lowest pitch (frequency)?
o: A normal person's average hearing range (100 Hz)
Sound wave vibration of a tuning fork (1500 Hz)
Sound wave of an electric bell (512 Hz)
Sound wave of an electric clock (350 Hz)

q: The atomic mass of carbon dioxide is _____.
Which of the following is the correct use of a concave mirror?
o: It is used as a side-view mirror of a vehicle
It is used as a reflector in a torch
It is used as a reflector in a car headlight to obtain a parallel beam of light
It is used in a torch

q: What can be inferred about the main features of plant cells from their cell wall?
o: Every plant cell has the following composition: cell wall is hard
Due to its structure the cell wall has the ability to deform
The cell wall, being made of cellulose, has different composition for different plants
It is rigid and gives shape to the cell, and cell walls are different

q: A 2 ohm and an x ohm resistor are connected in series with a 10 V battery. If the current flowing through the resistors is 2 A, then what is the value of x (in ohms)?
Which of the following plant nutrients is supplied from air?
Chlorophyll changes to which colour in the absence of sunlight?
The direction of the magnetic field at the centre of a current-carrying circular loop is determined by which of the following?
Work of 6000 J is done in lifting a 30 kg object to a height of 'x' m. Find the value of x (in m). (Take g = 10 m/s^2.)
If a piece of iron is added to a solution of iron(II) sulphate (FeSO4), what will happen?
Which of the following factors causes a change in the state of a substance?
o: Mixing two substances with each other

q: When ice is heated, what happens?
o: It absorbs latent heat and converts to water

q: An object's velocity at a certain point on a straight line is 10 m/s and final velocity is -2 m/s. What will be the average value of velocity?

Which of the following statements is correct regarding catalytic conversion? Statement A1: heat, water and instruments are used as new substances in the reaction. Statement A2: a catalyst remains unchanged in the reaction; heat, water and others are produced as products.
One tap can fill a tank in 6 minutes, while a second tap can fill the same tank in 9 minutes. If both taps are opened together, in how many minutes will the tank be filled?
In quadrilateral ABCD, angle A = 32 degrees and angle B = 58 degrees. The bisectors of angle C and angle D meet at point O. What will be the measure of angle DOC?
In an exam, B got 50 marks while A got 75 marks; the maximum marks is 110. What percentage of A's marks does B's mark fall short by? (Round the answer to two decimal places.)
The average age of a class of 23 students is 25 years. If the teacher's age is also included, the average age of all becomes 26 years. What is the teacher's age (in years)?
A pillar 30 m high stands on the ground and its shadow on the ground is 10√3 m long. What will be the angle of elevation of the Sun?
If 4^(x+1) = 64 x 8^x, then find the value of x.
A man can complete a piece of work in 5 hours and a boy can complete the same work in 6 hours. If both work together at the same rate, in how much time will they complete the work together?

A shoe wholesaler sells two pairs of shoes for the same selling price. On the first pair he gains 1 rupee and on the second pair he loses 1 rupee. If the cost price of the first pair is 60 rupees and the second pair is 70 rupees, what is the wholesaler's total cost price?
A typist takes 40 minutes to type 4 pages. How many pages will he type in 90 minutes at the same rate?
A person's age is 5 times the age of his younger brother. But that person is currently 27 years older than his younger brother, so what is the younger brother's age?

An amount of 1,964 rupees is divided among a man, a woman and a boy in such a way that if their respective shares are increased by 50, 117 and 10 rupees, then the increased shares are in the ratio 20.4:13. Find the woman's share.
If 10% of 1/3 of a number equals 40%, find 477 times that number.
If the mean of certain data is 19.8 more than its median, then by how much is its mode greater than its median? (Use the empirical relationship to find your answer.)
A metal cone whose height is 405 times its diameter is melted and recast into a solid spherical ball. Find the number of balls that can be made if the diameter of each ball is the same as the cone's.

In a race, the first runner covers 420 m in 140 seconds, and the second runner covers the same distance in 70 seconds. Find the distance (in m/sec) between them at the end. (Find the average speed of the cyclist.)
A businessman, walking at 3/5 of his usual speed, reaches his office 24 minutes late. How much time does he usually take to travel between his home and office?
